response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Naver, and relevant cloud (AWS) and tooling (MCP) exposure, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph — key requirements for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at Naver.
Extensive full-stack proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS) with production-scale systems.
Strong track record of open-source contributions, technical mentoring, and building observability/evaluation tooling.
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI or LLM systems; most AI exposure is recent.
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI.
Limited documentation of data pipeline design for unstructured data or LLM performance optimization techniques.
